		<geometry>497, 56, 137, 223</geometry>
		<compartment compartmentID='TAGGED_VALUES2'/>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='Note' xmi:id='_18_4_be00301_1467380119045_617666_22550'>
		<elementID xmi:idref='_18_3beta_be00301_1442394858580_279465_15035'/>
		<properties>
			<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
				<propertyID>HTML_TEXT</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>HTML_TEXT_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				<value xmi:value='true'/>
			</mdElement>
		</properties>
		<geometry>301, 35, 126, 381</geometry>
		<compartment compartmentID='TAGGED_VALUES2'/>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<text>&lt;html&gt;
  &lt;head&gt;
		&lt;style&gt;
			p {padding:0px; margin:0px;}
		&lt;/style&gt;
	&lt;/head&gt;
  &lt;body&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
Simulation start time is set to 0, end time is set to 30 &lt;b&gt;minutes&lt;/b&gt;.

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
Clock step is set to 1 &lt;b&gt;minute&lt;/b&gt;.

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
To be able to see flow of the time in plots, a real-world delay of 0.001 minute is added on every clock step. 

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&amp;#160;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&amp;#160;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
Duration is simulated to take a random time from min-max range from every duration constraint on actions.

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&amp;#160;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
Timeline is configured to show Activity occurences and their duration.

    &lt;/p&gt;

&lt;/body&gt;
&lt;/html&gt;</text>
		<active xmi:idref='_18_4_be00301_1467619832506_796816_22989'/>
	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='NoteAnchor' xmi:id='_18_4_be00301_1467619832506_796816_22989'>
		<linkFirstEndID xmi:idref='_18_3beta_be00301_1442394858609_916276_15067'/>
		<linkSecondEndID xmi:idref='_18_4_be00301_1467380119045_617666_22550'/>

	</mdElement>

		<linkSecondEndID xmi:idref='_18_4_be00301_1467380119045_617666_22550'/>

</mdOwnedViews>

		</properties>
		<geometry>35, 357, 224, 203</geometry>
		<compartment compartmentID='TAGGED_VALUES2'/>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<text>&lt;html&gt;
  &lt;head&gt;
		&lt;style&gt;
			p {padding:0px; margin:0px;}
		&lt;/style&gt;
	&lt;/head&gt;
  &lt;body&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
&amp;#160;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;b&gt;&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:14pt;&quot;&gt;ChangeColor&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/b&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&amp;#160;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
Change Color Activity consists of Paint and Dry steps.

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
Duration constraints are put on call behavior actions to simulate some &amp;quot;business&amp;quot; for given duration of time.

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
Click on Configuration icon to see simulation configuration details.

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
Run &lt;b&gt;ChangeColor&lt;/b&gt; configuration from the main toolbar dropdown list.

    &lt;/p&gt;

&lt;/body&gt;
&lt;/html&gt;</text>
		<active xmi:idref='_18_4_be00301_1467619759941_824214_22955'/>
	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='NoteAnchor' xmi:id='_18_4_be00301_1467619759941_824214_22955'>
		<linkFirstEndID xmi:idref='_18_4_be00301_1467619932769_845220_23023'/>
		<linkSecondEndID xmi:idref='_18_4_be00301_1467619730584_673392_22919'/>
		<geometry>259, 455; 378, 452; </geometry>
	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='DiagramShape' xmi:id='_18_4_be00301_1467620023428_910864_23126'>
		<elementID xmi:idref='_18_3beta_be00301_1442394858384_120049_15002'/>
		<geometry>273, 455, 88, 46</geometry>
		<compartment compartmentID='TAGGED_VALUES'/>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<diagramOverviewScale xmi:value='1.0'/>
	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='Note' xmi:id='_18_4_be00301_1467621005308_845310_23234'>
		<properties>
			<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
				<propertyID>HTML_TEXT</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>HTML_TEXT_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				<value xmi:value='true'/>
			</mdElement>
		</properties>
		<geometry>21, 42, 385, 210</geometry>
		<compartment compartmentID='TAGGED_VALUES2'/>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<text>&lt;html&gt;
  &lt;head&gt;
		&lt;style&gt;
			p {padding:0px; margin:0px;}
		&lt;/style&gt;
	&lt;/head&gt;
  &lt;body&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
This model demonstrates:

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;ul&gt;
      &lt;li&gt;
Usage of the simulation clock settings

      &lt;/li&gt;
      &lt;li&gt;
Duration constraints

      &lt;/li&gt;
      &lt;li&gt;
Duration simulation modes

      &lt;/li&gt;
      &lt;li&gt;
Activity Timeline plots

      &lt;/li&gt;
      &lt;li&gt;
Activity allocations

      &lt;/li&gt;
      &lt;li&gt;
Dynamic instantiation of variable resources

      &lt;/li&gt;
      &lt;li&gt;
SysML 1.4 adjunct properties

      &lt;/li&gt;
      &lt;li&gt;
Recording time values into properties

      &lt;/li&gt;
    &lt;/ul&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;b&gt;&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:14pt;&quot;&gt;Scroll down to see descriptions of the &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:14pt;&quot;&gt;different cases&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/b&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

&lt;/body&gt;
&lt;/html&gt;</text>
	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='DiagramShape' xmi:id='_18_4_be00301_1467621180604_503640_23689'>
		<elementID xmi:idref='_18_3beta_be00301_1442407215979_66678_15117'/>
		<properties>
			<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
				<propertyID>SHOW_DIAGRAM_OVERVIEW_CONTENT</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>SHOW_DIAGRAM_OVERVIEW_CONTENT_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				<value xmi:value='true'/>
			</mdElement>
		</properties>
		<geometry>350, 595, 577, 191</geometry>
		<compartment compartmentID='TAGGED_VALUES'/>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<diagramOverviewScale xmi:value='1.021015761821366'/>
	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='Note' xmi:id='_18_4_be00301_1467621192512_640629_23719'>
		<elementID xmi:idref='_18_3beta_be00301_1442407215979_66678_15117'/>
		<properties>
			<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
				<propertyID>HTML_TEXT</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>HTML_TEXT_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				<value xmi:value='true'/>
			</mdElement>
		</properties>
		<geometry>35, 595, 189, 233</geometry>
		<compartment compartmentID='TAGGED_VALUES2'/>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<text>&lt;html&gt;
  &lt;head&gt;
		&lt;style&gt;
			p {padding:0px; margin:0px;}
		&lt;/style&gt;
	&lt;/head&gt;
  &lt;body&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;b&gt;&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:14pt;&quot;&gt;Allocation&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/b&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&amp;#160;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
Paint and Dry activities are defined outside the Factory block. Paint activity is allocated to Painter and Dry to a Dryer.

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&amp;#160;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
Run &lt;b&gt;Allocation&lt;/b&gt; configuration.

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&amp;#160;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
In a Timeline you can see that the main ChangeColor activity is activity of the Factory, but Paint and Dry are performed by workers.

    &lt;/p&gt;

&lt;/body&gt;
&lt;/html&gt;</text>
		<active xmi:idref='_18_4_be00301_1467621337506_794698_23997'/>
	</mdElement>

	<mdElement elementClass='DiagramShape' xmi:id='_18_4_be00301_1467637577866_182967_29770'>
		<elementID xmi:idref='_18_4_be00301_1465607711994_551576_19079'/>
		<geometry>231, 1309, 93, 46</geometry>
		<compartment compartmentID='TAGGED_VALUES'/>

	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='DiagramShape' xmi:id='_18_4_be00301_1467637632549_37168_29937'>
		<elementID xmi:idref='_18_4_be00301_1466657039038_368577_18904'/>
		<properties>
			<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
				<propertyID>SHOW_DIAGRAM_OVERVIEW_CONTENT</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>SHOW_DIAGRAM_OVERVIEW_CONTENT_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				<value xmi:value='true'/>
			</mdElement>
		</properties>
		<geometry>350, 1624, 689, 440</geometry>

	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='DiagramShape' xmi:id='_18_4_be00301_1467641876818_89619_30823'>
		<elementID xmi:idref='_18_4_be00301_1465607712079_915954_19189'/>
		<geometry>231, 1372, 88, 46</geometry>
		<compartment compartmentID='TAGGED_VALUES'/>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<diagramOverviewScale xmi:value='1.0'/>
	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='Note' xmi:id='_18_4_be00301_1467642033671_74678_31046'>
		<properties>
			<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
				<propertyID>HTML_TEXT</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>HTML_TEXT_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				<value xmi:value='true'/>
			</mdElement>
		</properties>
		<geometry>35, 1239, 189, 188</geometry>
		<compartment compartmentID='TAGGED_VALUES2'/>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<text>&lt;html&gt;
  &lt;head&gt;
		&lt;style&gt;
			p {padding:0px; margin:0px;}
		&lt;/style&gt;
	&lt;/head&gt;
  &lt;body&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;b&gt;&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:14pt;&quot;&gt;Many Workers&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/b&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&amp;#160;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
Demonstrates how variable number of resources can be instantiated and allocated.

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
Configuration of the system can be done in an instance table, by entering number of workers and change color requests.

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&amp;#160;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
Run &lt;b&gt;Many workers&lt;/b&gt; config

    &lt;/p&gt;

&lt;/body&gt;
&lt;/html&gt;</text>
	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='Note' xmi:id='_18_4_be00301_1467642080464_409683_31106'>
		<properties>
			<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
				<propertyID>HTML_TEXT</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>HTML_TEXT_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				<value xmi:value='true'/>
			</mdElement>
		</properties>
		<geometry>35, 1638, 189, 428</geometry>
		<compartment compartmentID='TAGGED_VALUES2'/>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<text>&lt;html&gt;
  &lt;head&gt;
		&lt;style&gt;
			p {padding:0px; margin:0px;}
		&lt;/style&gt;
	&lt;/head&gt;
  &lt;body&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;b&gt;&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:14pt;&quot;&gt;Ontological&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/b&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&amp;#160;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
Activities are decomposed into nested activities using Composition relationships with SysML 1.4 Adjunct properties representing callBehaviorActions.

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
The main classifier behavior of The system is represented by SysML 1.4 Classifier Behavior Property.

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
All Activities inherits &amp;quot;duration&amp;quot; property from common TimedActivity pattern.

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
Duration property is automatically set by Cameo Simulation Toolkit at the termination of every Activity occurrence.

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
IBD diagram is used to access these temporal behavior properties and &amp;quot;propagate&amp;quot; them to the upper system level using binding connectors.

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
Run &lt;b&gt;Ontological&lt;/b&gt; config and see duration values recorded into the Durations table.

    &lt;/p&gt;

&lt;/body&gt;
&lt;/html&gt;</text>
	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='Note' xmi:id='_18_4_be00301_1467974906616_788688_23871'>
		<properties>
			<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
				<propertyID>HTML_TEXT</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>HTML_TEXT_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				<value xmi:value='true'/>
			</mdElement>
		</properties>
		<geometry>42, 2121, 189, 220</geometry>
		<compartment compartmentID='TAGGED_VALUES2'/>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<text>&lt;html&gt;
  &lt;head&gt;
		&lt;style&gt;
			p {padding:0px; margin:0px;}
		&lt;/style&gt;
	&lt;/head&gt;
  &lt;body&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;b&gt;&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:14pt;&quot;&gt;Ontological with many workers and tasks&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/b&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&amp;#160;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
Merged version of many variable workers configuration and ontological behaviors with adjunct and timing properties.

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
It also demonstrates how timing Requirements can be verified.

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&amp;#160;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
Open Durations table, modify initial values in the first line and run &lt;b&gt;Ontological Configurable&lt;/b&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

&lt;/body&gt;
&lt;/html&gt;</text>
	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='Note' xmi:id='_18_4_be00301_1467975931768_500974_24428'>
		<elementID xmi:idref='_18_3beta_be00301_1442413870899_164912_17183'/>
		<properties>
			<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
				<propertyID>HTML_TEXT</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>HTML_TEXT_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				<value xmi:value='true'/>
			</mdElement>
		</properties>
		<geometry>49, 889, 140, 233</geometry>
		<compartment compartmentID='TAGGED_VALUES2'/>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<text>&lt;html&gt;
  &lt;head&gt;
		&lt;style&gt;
			p {padding:0px; margin:0px;}
		&lt;/style&gt;
	&lt;/head&gt;
  &lt;body&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;b&gt;&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:14pt;&quot;&gt;UseCase Diagram&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/b&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&amp;#160;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
CST can run Use Case diagram directly.

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
It automatically creates and opens windows for every actor with a button representing associated use cases.

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
In this example, Customer can request to change color multiple times.

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&amp;#160;

    &lt;/p&gt;

&lt;/body&gt;
&lt;/html&gt;</text>
		<active xmi:idref='_18_4_be00301_1467976806959_197143_24601'/>
	</mdElement>
